Canonical Mapping Layer vw_map_*

3
Physical Tables dim_* / fact_*
Remediated physical model • 112 tables • 2396 columns • 18 new tables added • Surrogate PKs + SCD2 standardized
Persistent • partitioned by layer
v6 Remediation Applied: Surrogate PKs on all dim tables • Composite BKs on multi-row dims (contact, address, document, relationship, KYC) • Transactional fact PKs (17 tables) • dim_party hub created • dim_product_holding created • SCD2 standardized (effective_from/to + is_current) • 30+ data types corrected • 16 satellite/detail tables extracted from wide tables • 158 _N suffixed columns refactored
Layer A — Party & Core Dimensions
▦
dim_individual_party
INDIVIDUAL_PARTY — 54 columns • 1 PK • 1 BK • 0 FK
DIM Layer A
ColumnTypeData TypeDescription
individual_party_skPKBIGINT IDENTITYSurrogate primary key for dim_individual_party
party_idBKVARCHAR(64)Natural business key for dim_individual_party
effective_fromMTTIMESTAMPSCD2 effective start timestamp

4
CRM Serving Layer crm360_level*
13 purpose-built views for CRM screens and APIs. L1 = precomputed • L2 = domain summary • L3 = paginated drilldown
CRM UI must never query raw CDC tables
L1
crm360_level1_customer_summary
Fast customer landing summary: identity, profile, critical flags and product/current-state snapshot fields.
Precomputed · fastest · called on screen load Materialized table/cache
513

1:1↓

Root aggregate for customer 360.
